svg.title: Sanitized Browser Bailiff terminal output
svg.desc: Example Browser Bailiff audit output showing browser extension risk findings.

g.text: Browser Profile Extension Name Version Permissions Last Updated Risk Finding
Chrome Default Example Request Watch 4.8.1 <all_urls>, cookies, webRequest... 42 days HIGH sensitive permission: <all_urls>...
Edge Work Legacy PDF Helper 1.1.0 tabs, storage 611 days HIGH not updated in over 365 days
Firefox default Session Notes 2.0.3 storage, tabs 88 days MEDIUM moderate permission: storage, tabs
Chrome Default JSON Formatter 3.2.0 storage 12 days LOW minimal permissions
Edge Default Docs Offline 1.104.1 storage, https://docs.example/* 21 days LOW minimal permissions
Sanitized sample. Findings are review signals, not proof of malicious behavior.
